title: Slow Roasted American Chicken Grill
description: A tender and herbal American dish featuring roasted chicken, served with a baguette and grilled to perfection, all in a low-calorie friendly agave-leaf vessel.
instructions: Preheat the grill to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a small bowl, mix together olive oil, thyme, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper.
Place the chicken breast in a large bowl and brush the herbal mixture evenly over both sides of the chicken.
Wrap each chicken breast in an agave leaf, making sure to seal the leaf tightly around the chicken.
Place the wrapped chicken on the grill and cook for 30 minutes per side, or until the internal temperature reaches 165 degrees Fahrenheit.
While the chicken is cooking, slice the baguette into 1-inch thick slices and grill until lightly toasted.
Once the chicken is cooked, remove it from the grill and let it rest for 10 minutes before slicing.
Serve the sliced chicken with the grilled baguette slices and enjoy.
